/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Brick.cpp.o -o breakout_week2  /usr/local/lib/libraylib.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so
